segments.title: Welcome to Scout
segments.summary: Introduces Scout as a persistent memory layer and frames the welcome workspace as a tutorial you can use, replace, or remove.

segments.title: What you're looking at
segments.summary: Explains the substrate shape (index/ and sources/) and introduces line-level provenance as the core property that lets you click any segment and land at the exact lines in the original document.

segments.title: How to add your own data
segments.summary: Three paths for pointing Scout at your own data: an existing substrate, building one from raw exports, or copying the welcome workspace as a template.

segments.title: When you are ready to remove this welcome
segments.summary: Three-step removal: point DOSSIER_ROOT at your real substrate, restart the dev server, and the welcome content falls away.
